features.title: Everything you need to dominate social media
features.subtitle: From creation to publishing, Studiio automates every step of your video content strategy.

0.title: AI Video Studio
0.desc: Create professional videos in just a few clicks. Animated text, smooth transitions, synced music — everything is automated.

1.title: AI Generation
1.desc: AI writes your scripts, picks the best visuals, syncs the music and optimises every video for maximum engagement.

2.title: Editorial Calendar
2.desc: Plan your posts for 30 days ahead. The AI Agent analyses your footage and automatically creates publish-ready drafts.

3.title: Multi-Platform Publishing
3.desc: Publish directly to Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts and Facebook from a single interface. No more copy-pasting.

4.title: Custom Objectives
4.desc: Define your marketing goals: promotion, subscriptions, motivation... Studiio tailors every video to your strategy.

5.title: Analytics & Performance
5.desc: Track views, likes and shares for every post. Understand what works and optimise your content.

formats.title: Every format, every platform
formats.subtitle: One tool to create content tailored to each social network.

howItWorks.title: 4 steps to professional videos
howItWorks.subtitle: No video editing skills required. Studiio does the work for you.

0.title: Choose your objective
0.desc: Promotion, motivation, subscriptions... Studiio adapts all content to your marketing strategy.

1.title: Upload your media
1.desc: Drag in your videos or photos. The AI automatically selects the best moments from each clip.

2.title: Customise in one click
2.desc: Text, music, transitions, logo — everything is editable. Or let the AI handle it all for you.

3.title: Publish everywhere
3.desc: Export or publish directly to Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and Facebook in one click.

testimonials.title: They create with Studiio
testimonials.subtitle: See how our users are transforming their content.

0.name: Sophie M.
0.text: Studiio transformed my social media presence. I create 10 videos a week in under an hour. My followers tripled in 3 months.

1.name: Marco D.
1.text: We manage 15 clients with Studiio. The batch x10 feature saves us 20 hours a week. The ROI is incredible.

2.name: Aminata K.
2.text: The AI that generates captions and hashtags is genius. My TikTok videos get 10x more views than before.

pricing.title: A plan for every ambition
pricing.subtitle: Start for free with 10 credits. No credit card required.
pricing.extraCredits: Need more credits? Buy additional packs:

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

0.a: 1 credit = 1 rendered video. When you create and export a video, one credit is used. Plan credits are renewed each month. If a render fails, your credit is refunded automatically.

1.q: Can I try it for free?
1.a: Yes! Every new account receives 10 free credits to test all features. No credit card required to sign up.

2.q: How do I connect my social networks?
2.a: Go to Settings > Social Networks and click "Connect" on the desired platform. Authentication is handled via OAuth — your credentials stay with Instagram, TikTok, etc. We never store your passwords.

3.a: Yes, at any time. Your subscription stays active until the end of the paid period. No commitment, no cancellation fees.

4.a: All videos are rendered in Full HD (1080p) with the H.264 codec optimised for each platform. The result is on par with professional editing.

5.a: A single render takes around 30 to 90 seconds. A batch of 10 videos takes 5 to 10 minutes. You'll be notified as soon as it's ready.

cta.titlePart1: Ready to create videos that go
cta.subtitle: Join 12,000+ creators. 10 free credits, no credit card. Your first video in under 2 minutes.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: This privacy policy applies to Studiio (accessible at studiio.pro) and Afroboost Studio, our application connected to social networks including TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube. Studiio and Afroboost Studio are operated by Bassi Original / Afroboost.

tiktokApp.title: 1b. Afroboost Studio App on TikTok
tiktokApp.content: The Afroboost Studio application (App ID: 7620817395090966540) is a registered application on the TikTok for Developers platform. Afroboost Studio uses the TikTok API (Login Kit and Content Posting API) to allow users to connect their TikTok account and publish video content directly from the Studiio platform. By using Afroboost Studio, you authorise the application to access your TikTok profile and publish content on your behalf.

dataCollection.title: 2. Data Collection
dataCollection.content: Studiio and Afroboost Studio collect the information necessary for the service to function: email address, name, and social network connection data (OAuth tokens). This data is used solely to publish content to your connected accounts.

dataUsage.title: 3. Use of Data
dataUsage.content: Your data is used by Studiio and Afroboost Studio to: authenticate your account, publish content on the platforms you have connected (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube), and improve our services.

dataSharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except as required for the technical operation of the service (hosting, social network APIs).

security.title: 5. Security
security.content: Your access tokens are stored securely and encrypted. We use HTTPS for all communications.

dataDeletion.title: 6. Data Deletion
dataDeletion.content: You may request the deletion of your data at any time by contacting us at contact.artboost@gmail.com or by disconnecting your social accounts from the dashboard.
